research_notes.summary: The LAUSD Legistar API has reliable roll-call vote data only from approximately June 2025 onward. Earlier meetings have matter records but no individual vote records populated. Several requested votes predate this window or are not yet in the system.

not_found.reason: Predates the Legistar vote data window. No results for 'AllHere', 'chatbot', or 'AI' keyword searches. Contract was likely approved as part of a bundled procurement actions report, not as a standalone roll-call item.
No results for 'iReady', 'Curriculum Associates', or 'i-Ready'. Likely bundled within procurement actions reports.

not_found.requested: IT Infrastructure master services bench (~$250M, Nov 2025)
not_found.reason: The specific '$250M master services bench' was not found as a single item. Three related IT SEP amendment items from Dec 16, 2025 were found instead (School Network Upgrade Phase 3, Connectivity Pilot, Campus Safety Systems). The bench contract may have been approved under a different title or as part of a larger procurement action.
The most recent Board of Education meeting in Legistar is Dec 16, 2025. No Feb 2026 data exists in the system yet.
No BOE meetings recorded after Dec 2025. Keywords 'layoff', 'reduction in force', 'RIF' returned no results.
No results for 'cybersecurity', 'cyber security', 'cyber', or 'staffing bench'. May be bundled in procurement or under a different title.
Predates available vote data. UTLA contract ratification in 2023 likely passed via consent or was not recorded with individual votes in Legistar.
Same as teacher pay - predates available vote data window.
No BOE events with vote data before approximately June 2025. Keywords 'cellphone', 'cell phone', 'phone', 'mobile device' returned no results.

not_found.requested: Resolution to cut ties with ICE-connected vendors (March 2026)
not_found.reason: No data after Dec 2025. The Dec 16, 2025 immigration enforcement resolution (Res-025-25/26) is the closest match found - it addresses community safety during heightened immigration enforcement but does not specifically reference cutting vendor ties.
Superintendent contract matters are typically handled in Closed Session and do not appear in public Legistar records with roll-call votes.

api_notes.name_discrepancies: Legistar spells 'Schmerelson' as 'Schmererelson' (extra 'e') and 'Newbill' as 'Sherlett H. Newbill' (no 'Hendy'). Rivas appears without 'Dr.' prefix. Vote data has been normalized to requested names.
api_notes.jerry_yang: Board member Jerry Yang (PersonId 755) appears in Dec 2025 votes as 'Absent'. He is not in the original 7-member list but may need to be included for future votes.
api_notes.vote_data_coverage: Roll-call vote records are only populated for June 2025 and Dec 2025 BOE meetings. Earlier meetings have EventItems but empty vote arrays.
api_notes.it_infrastructure_votes: Items 85710 and 85711 returned identical vote IDs to item 85709 (all pointing to EventItemId 85837), suggesting the API may have consolidated these votes or they were voted on as a block.
